author: Layne Hughes
title: Layne Hughes
body: Layne was professional, reassuring and very friendly. She was truthful.  I was totally at ease with her and trusted her.  She delivered as promised so would definitely recommend her to family and friends.  Thanks Layne

author: A smooth process with a great result
title: A smooth process with a great result
body:
With her enthusiasm, positivity, sound advice, and attention for detail, Layne made selling our lovely home a smooth process with an outcome we are very happy with. We worked well together to create a plan that suited our circumstances, and it went as we had hoped for, selling within 5 weeks. 
Layne is a lovely and caring person, who easily connects with people.
She was thorough in following up with interested parties and provided us with regular updates where things were at. As far as we can tell, Layne is very good at getting to know and supporting potential buyers. This resulted in a very quick negotiation process to finalise the sale after the tender. We can highly recommend Layne!

author: Great support
title: Great support
body: Layne was great with sound advice and very helpful with makung sure the house was ready to sell.

author: Amazing Agent
title: Amazing Agent
body: Layne was so helpful and so lovely in guiding us through the auction process. She was so helpful at the open homes and made the whole process so easy!

author: Outstanding understanding of the market, advice and execution.
title: Outstanding understanding of the market, advice and execution.
body: As agent for the sale of my aunt's estate Layne and the Harcouts Khandallah team brought a thorough understanding of the local market, gave sound advice about how to prepare the property for sale and the method of sale (auction), concieved a unique marketing pitch (nearly 7000 views on TradeMe), and without fuss achieved an outstanding outcome in a challenging market.

author: Great communication and quick turn around
title: Great communication and quick turn around
body: Layne was wonderful to work with. Her manner was very professional and she responded to my plethora of calls, texts, and e-mails quickly. Her genuine warmth and enthusiasm really shone through. Thank you for helping me find the house of my dreams, Layne!

author: Amazing service and results!
title: Amazing service and results!
body: Layne was so helpful every step of the way and happy to help out with paperwork or staging - all the little things to make the process easier for us! Would highly recommend Layne to anyone considering selling. Thanks again!

author: Went over and above
title: Went over and above
body: Layne was great to deal with. Punctual and nothing seemed to be an issue. She got the best result for all involved. Look forward to dealing with her next time.

author: Warm, friendly and knowledgeable
title: Warm, friendly and knowledgeable
body: Very welcoming and knowledgeable at open homes and private viewing. Fast, clear communications throughout and great result!

author: Layne was professional, enthusiastic and really went above and beyond to get us very good outcome!
title: Layne was professional, enthusiastic and really went above and beyond to get us very good outcome!
body: We were very impressed by Layne's professionalism, responsiveness, enthusiasm, hard work and flair.  She put in a lot of work to market and promote our home, above and beyond what we expected.  Layne was always quick to respond and pass on information, gave us good advice and was always friendly and easy to deal with.  The end result was a good outcome for us.

author: Proactive and Passionate Performer!
title: Proactive and Passionate Performer!
body:
Layne impressed from day one with her clear, upfront and positive approach to engaging with us. 

Layne is a passionate and talented marketer of a property. Providing careful thought, local knowledge and unique and impactful  execution to the campaign. And she kept us informed every step of the way, achieving an outcome and interest beyond what I had hoped and expected. 

I would 100% recommend Layne to anyone looking to sell their home.

author: Perfection
title: Perfection
body: I couldn’t have asked for a better real estate agent. Layne went above and beyond at every step. Despite things being a bit challenging with my relocation to Auckland, she was always available when needed and guided me through the entire process, answering all of my questions along the way. She took the stress out of everything and made the experience seamless. The property sold far quicker than I expected. It was a pleasure meeting and working with her, and I would happily use her again if I own property in Wellington.

author: Knowledgable and friendly
title: Knowledgable and friendly
body: A responsive agent from the get go.  Had a good knowledge of the property & general market.

author: Wise analysis and advice
title: Wise analysis and advice
body: We asked a small number of agents for their proposals. Layne (and Mark) were neither the cheapest nor the dearest, but were compatible from the start, and there was no real doubt that we would choose them. They listened to what we wanted to do, and why; rather than telling us what they would be imposing. The sale took a while (as they do in our sector of the market). Layne worked away and encouraged/assisted the buyer so that when they presented the buyer to us we went from initial offer to conditional then unconditional contract in four days. We are very satisfied.

author: Professional, Proactive, and a Pleasure to Work With
title: Professional, Proactive, and a Pleasure to Work With
body: We recently sold our property with Layne and couldn’t be happier with the experience. She was attentive from the start, really took the time to understand what we wanted, and helped us navigate a few bumps along the way. Layne was proactive, engaging, and incredibly knowledgeable about the market, working hard to get us a realistic and positive outcome. An absolute pleasure to work with — highly recommended.

author: First Home Buyer
title: First Home Buyer
body:
It was wonderful working through a stressful process with Layne.

I was a first home buyer and didn't know the ropes and she helped every step of the way. she was very accommodating for my multiple inspections and reports of the property AND personally ensured the house was clean and tidy on settlement day before I got the keys.
 
Would happily work with Layne again.

author: Good sales experience
title: Good sales experience
body: Layne was easy to work with throughout the sales process and worked hard and willingly to secure a satisfactory result. Many thanks.

author: Patient, professional, excellent agent
title: Patient, professional, excellent agent
body: Excellent service from start to finish. Layne made the whole process smooth and stress-free, and we’re thrilled with our new home. Highly recommended!

author: Highly rated and experience!
title: Highly rated and experience!
body:
We recently bought a house, and an amazing experience with Layne. We truly appreciate her professionalism and friendly approach. She was very supportive and helpful throughout the whole process. Layne always kept us updated, answered all our questions promptly and made everything feel smooth and stress free.  Even after we moved in, she checked on us to make sure everything is ok. 
Highly recommend Layne to anyone looking to buy or sell.

author: Making the customer matter
title: Making the customer matter
body:
Right from start Layne was in my good books as she was recommended by a friend. This did also mean it set a bar she needed to meet.
Everything I was told was true. Layne has a wonderful engaging nature that put me at ease. Every step of the process was explained up front in a language I could understand. Every question I had was treated with respect, however naive it was. This meant I had a very good understanding from the start. As we progressed on our journey of selling the property everything went well, as clear and regular communcation was provided from Layne. Even the few minor challenges that came up were easily dealt with. 
Been the first time selling a property for me, I was apprehensive going into the unknown. Layne has made this a very good experience for me and I will always be thankful.
Cheers
Paul

author: Friendly, effective and efficient.
title: Friendly, effective and efficient.
body: Layne is a friendly and approachable agent who immediately makes you feel comfortable discussing all aspects of the property. Her warm and personable manner helps take the stress out of the process. She’s also highly effective; communication with her is clear, prompt, and efficient, ensuring nothing gets delayed or overlooked. She values your time and makes the entire experience smooth and hassle-free.

author: Great facilitator
title: Great facilitator
body: Bought a house through Layne, she made the process easy with good communication and knowledge.

author: Personable and professional
title: Personable and professional
body:
From our first meeting, we had a great connection with Layne. We were all on the same page and understood our roles to achieve a good outcome.
Layne was very efficient and well organised. She co-ordinated the home staging, builders report, the very professional marketing strategy and of course Layne was there for all our open homes. Everything went seamlessly, and the selling process was stress-free. We will be entrusting Layne with another home sale later in the year. Thanks heaps Layne, you've been amazing!

author: Choose Layne - no pain, all gain
title: Choose Layne - no pain, all gain
body:
We chose Layne because of her outstanding communication skills. She was great to work with, and we were happy with our choice at every stage. We didn't think the house would sell in these market conditions but Layne got it done. There was so much we didn't know and she answered all of our questions knowledgeably and professionally. She was so easy to talk with and fun to run through all the scenarios.

We really appreciated Layne's honesty throughout the process as we made tricky decisions. We liked that she didn't sugarcoat it but was direct in her relentless optimism. It was just what we needed.

author: Exciting, easy and stress free
title: Exciting, easy and stress free
body: Layne was great throughout the process with her knowledge of the properties to her communication skills, never had a problem getting in touch with her, answered all of our query promptly and efficiently.

author: Completely committed! Went over and beyond our expectations. Highly recommend Layne for your sale!
title: Completely committed! Went over and beyond our expectations. Highly recommend Layne for your sale!
body: Layne was passionate about selling our property. This was not an easy sell as we did not have the best builders report to make this easy. I think most real estate agents would have only given token effort to make the sale once we found out the challenges to sell.  However, Layne ran open homes every weekend over the months it took to sell. Layne also conducted private viewings during the week and even over public holidays. She 'had a nose' for interested parties, and kept in touch with them which resulted in a sale from a person who visited the property months before the sale. She worked hard for this sale and I would highly recommend Layne for anyone who is in the market to sell their property. Would highly recommend!

author: Great experience
title: Great experience
body: We were selling the property remotely so it was difficult for us to be on site.  However, Layne's professionalism and dedication made the process very straight forward.  Her industry knowledge is exceptional and her competence in working through the process, very reassuring.  She provided good advice, a comprehensive marketing plan, communicated with us well and made sure we were always informed on progress.  She exceeded expectations in making sure the property was always well presented to potential buyers and her relaxed and approachable personality made her very easy to work with and have confidence in.  We would positively recommend Layne to anyone looking to sell a property in the Wellington region.

author: Excellent very professional never gives up gives it her best
title: Excellent very professional never gives up gives it her best
body: Very good communication and kept us informed, very highly recommended

author: Layne Hughes is excellent!
title: Layne Hughes is excellent!
body: My experience with Layne Hughes was extraordinary. She is very kind, very professional and she knows a lot about the market. Communication was always effective and she was always happy to help. We are very happy with her service.

author: Lovely, professional service
title: Lovely, professional service
body:
Layne was great to work with. Very professional and easy to talk to.

She went through all the steps of the process and was very knowledgeable. She made the process smooth and easy.

author: Best agent in Wellington city - Layne Hughes
title: Best agent in Wellington city - Layne Hughes
body: We couldn’t have asked for a better partnership with Layne Hughes and Andrew Fanning. Layne worked so hard for us, keeping us informed and involved at every step of the sale process. We trusted her implicitly. She was a fabulous communicator  and was really personable. Nothing was ever too much trouble and she guided us through the sale process with ease. There were also big bonus points for the love she had for our cat Frankie! We would highly recommend Layne to anyone looking to sell or buy a house and if we have the opportunity again we would use Layne in a heartbeat.

author: Personable, professional and very helpful
title: Personable, professional and very helpful
body: We had a good experience with Layne, with straightforward advice and answers to our questions. Not planning on buying another house but would be happy to use Layne :)

author: A real star!
title: A real star!
body:
Layne has been excellent as a real estate agent. Since the first time we went to view the property she was super informed about the house and knew all the details, she was bubbly and kind which helps when deciding to put in an offer. She cared about all the small things even helping us to vision TV placement and baskets for storage, she also met up with us especially so we could put the sold sign on and take photo (as first home buyers it was nice to capture a memory of this milestone), for pre-inspection Layen was there with bells on and everything ready to go for us. 

Thank you so much Layne you have been so helpful and kind throughout and for tērā we are very grateful - we highly recommend Layne she is a real star!! 

Aphiphany & Peter

author: Katie and Layne provided very helpful and supportive services with every steps for the marketing.
title: Katie and Layne provided very helpful and supportive services with every steps for the marketing.
body: Every moment from the beginning of the marketing, I felt very easy and comfortable with Layne and Katie's well organized supporting including nice presentation, every detailed advises for selling and even physical helping for gardening...etc. It was a bit longer journey until getting sold the house compare to my expectation, however, fortunately I've got so positive and confident energy from them during the whole journey which means they worked very professional and wisely. The communication has been so wonderful and smooth between me and them and also I've got very prompt feedback whenever I needed. I really appreciate to Layne and Katie for the lovely assistance and big helping!! They worked really well and awesome. They are super friendly, trustable and professional agents in my experience!

author: Friendly & Professional
title: Friendly & Professional
body: Layne was very professional and knowledgeable and we knew we were in good hands right from the beginning. Her positivity and friendliness made the experience smooth and enjoyable, which we really appreciated after a not so great experience with another agency prior to teaming up with Layne. We highly recommend Layne!

author: Very supportive and enthusiastic
title: Very supportive and enthusiastic
body: Layne is very supportive and positive person and has made the experience of purchasing our house, very enjoyable. She has always made herself available to us at any point along the process and we’re very thankful we had her as our agents.

author: Excellent Agent.
title: Excellent Agent.
body: We contacted Layne as she had recently sold our neighbours' property very successfully. At that point we were just wanting to get a feel for the market etc. Then due to a sudden too good to miss career relocation we wanted to sell quickly and it was all on! We called Layne on a Saturday, she met with us again that Sunday, had the caravan through Monday morning, photographer same day, our house fully marketed by that following Thursday, ran a strong campaign with a tender that we moved forward to accommodate us, leading to a satisfactory unconditional offer within two weeks, with a short settlement period. A total whirlwind with an outcome that could not have been accomplished without Layne's professionalism, pragmatism and positivity. The regular reminders from Layne to "trust the process" should actually translate to "Trust Layne"!! Team up with Layne and you won't go wrong.

author: Kind and helpful
title: Kind and helpful
body: Layne was a true professional throughout the process. Always happy to answer questions and made the process very easy for us.

author: Supportive and professional
title: Supportive and professional
body: Layne was a pleasure to work with. She was always available to talk to and was very supportive of our first home buying process. She made us feel comfortable in something we had never done before.

author: Superstar in the making
title: Superstar in the making
body: We had a poor experience with another agency and Layne gave us confidence to try again with her. She said she would deliver and deliver she did with multiple offers following a short campaign. A great agent to deal with and produces great results. Layne is trustworthy, professional and knowledgeable and her relaxed manner and humour put people at ease. We would highly recommend her

author: Amazing!!!
title: Amazing!!!
body: Layne is so lovely and thought of us when she knew we were looking to bring us this home. I've found her 10/10 helpful, supportive, and very good at communicating. Highly highly recommend her to sellers as my experience as a buyer has been fab. Thank you!!

author: Layne goes above and beyond!
title: Layne goes above and beyond!
body: Layne was amazing with our recent sale. In a challenging market, we had a fantastic campaign and Layne went above and beyond to help me get the house ready for market. She provided great advice, was very communicative, knowledgeable and highly professional. I have worked with Layne a couple of times now, and she’s gotten us results every single time. I would highly recommend Layne to anyone wanting to sell.

author: "Exceptional Experience: Layne Made Our First Home Purchase a Breeze!"
title: "Exceptional Experience: Layne Made Our First Home Purchase a Breeze!"
body:
Absolutely thrilled to share our exceptional experience with Layne, on buying our first home. Layne's professionalism, expertise, and genuine dedication made the entire journey smooth and stress-free. From our initial meeting at one of the open homes to the final closing, Layne was always available to answer our questions, provide valuable insights, and offer all the support.

Layne's deep knowledge of the market and keen attention to detail ensured that we found the perfect home that met all our needs and budget. Layne's negotiation skills and strategic thinking were key in securing an amazing deal for our new home in a popular suburb.

We couldn't be happier with the outcome and wholeheartedly recommend Layne to anyone looking to buy a home. Thank you, Layne, for making our dream of homeownership a reality! Five stars all the way! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

author: Committed
title: Committed
body:
Layne was 100% involved right through the process  even did the gardens for me 
I am truly grateful for her help and support  and of course closing the deal in three weeks

author: Great experience
title: Great experience
body: Layne was a great agent and guided me through the buying process. Her small touches were invaluable and made my first home purchase a very positive one.

author: Freindly, Helpful and easy to communicate with.
title: Freindly, Helpful and easy to communicate with.
body:
Layne was great to work with from the beginning, even though we were running late for the open home she stayed on for another 15 minutes so we could get an opportunity to see the place. She took the time when we set up a second viewing to talk us through how the process worked which as first home buyers we really appreciated, and she was understanding an patient with us generally. 
We are so happy with our new home and very appreciative of Layne's help.

author: Layne was wonderfully helpful
title: Layne was wonderfully helpful
body: Layne was wonderfully helpful to us as first home buyers and helped us navigate the process with professionalism and integrity. She was responsive to our requests for information and was invaluable for my partner and I in securing our first house.

author: Great communication and professionalism
title: Great communication and professionalism
body: Layne was a wonderful agent to work with. She is extremely professional but also friendly and easy to communicate with.  She is skilled at marketing and gave us lots of great advice to get our house ready for market.

author: Best agent ever :)
title: Best agent ever :)
body: Layne was so lovely and knowledgable. She made everything easy for us, we couldn't have asked for a better agent. Highly recommend her to anyone looking to sell their property.

author: Great work!
title: Great work!
body: Thanks Layne ... extremely professional, and knows the market well! It was a tough old market too ... :)

author: Exceptional first home buying experience!
title: Exceptional first home buying experience!
body: Layne was awesome with our first home purchase. We went out on a limb and put in a pre auction offer which Layne stepped us through and answered any and all of our questions. She was kind and had great advice and guidance at every step along the way. We would recommend her to any other home buyers!

author: Goes the extra mile to make everything work out
title: Goes the extra mile to make everything work out
body: Layne is a fantastic agent. She negotiated a complex situation, pulling out all the stops to make the deal work. She was delightful to deal with throughout.  We would thoroughly recommend her.

author: Great service!
title: Great service!
body: We found Layne to be thoroughly professional and responsive to our queries throughout the buying process. A trusted agent that is a credit to her profession.

author: We highly recommend Layne
title: We highly recommend Layne
body:
Our experience with Layne in selling our house was fantastic. Layne's market knowledge and communication were exceptional throughout, consistently inspiring trust and confidence at every step.

What truly sets Layne apart is her approachable and friendly demeanour, turning what could be a transaction into an enjoyable experience. We highly recommend Layne for anyone seeking a real estate agent.

author: Excellent all rounder
title: Excellent all rounder
body:
Layne was referred to me by another agent form out of town. The first conversation we had by phone we clicked, and Layne was the agent for us.
We have found Layne to be very personable which helped ease our fears in the process of selling as it was my mother's house.
Layne guided us in what we had to do to make the house ready for sale. Without her help we would not have achieved the result that we did.
Layne's knowledge in guiding us was beyond compare, as was her honesty and integrity.
I would not hesitate to recommend to any person wanting to sell or buy a house.

author: Great estate agent made selling our house easy!
title: Great estate agent made selling our house easy!
body: We were so pleased we chose Layne to sell our house. She listened to our individual needs & concerns and her communication with us was excellent responding promptly to our questions. Layne is highly professional with a great knowledge of real estate. She was friendly and easy to talk to. Layne did a wonderful job of selling our house and we highly recommend her if you are buying or selling a house. Harcourts are fortunate to have her working with them.

author: Ray of Sunshine
title: Ray of Sunshine
body: Layne was so brilliant with her guidance, advice and patience through the hectic process of buying my first home. Super positive, super encouraging, super professional and always available for questions tips and recommendations! Very glad and appreciative to have had the pleasure to work with her throughout this rollercoaster ride!

author: Hard working with great communication
title: Hard working with great communication
body:
I found Layne excellent to deal with. From the outset she was approachable, helpful and honest. We had a tricky settlement and tight timeframes, which required her to go above and beyond; she did an exemplary job.
I highly recomend Layne.

author: Layne delivered us a successful outcome to what was a challenging property to sell.
title: Layne delivered us a successful outcome to what was a challenging property to sell.
body: Layne’s persistence and focus was outstanding.  Our property had several drawbacks, but Layne never let that derail her from completing the task.  Her communication was excellent, and I always felt on top of the situation in knowing where things stood.

author: Layne was professional, helpful and accessible.
title: Layne was professional, helpful and accessible.
body: Layne went above and beyond and was a delight to work with.

author: Got the job done
title: Got the job done
body: Layne helped us through a tricky sales process and went the extra yards to ensure our house got sold.

author: Layne was personable, helpful and efficient.
title: Layne was personable, helpful and efficient.
body:
I initially approached Julie Hurley of Harcourts, Khandallah, on recommendation of a family friend. Julie had moved to Auckland and she highly recommended Layne Hughes.  Julie had chosen Layne to market her own house which was recommendation in itself.

Layne was easy to work with most of the time, she had a very good market knowledge and communicated this well. Her Vendor's Reports were also very helpful. However, at the crucial time when the offer was presented  we felt there was undue pressure to rush the decision as we were not allowed the time we had requested to talk together as a family. This negatively impacted on the final price we got for the house and this, combined with the downturn in the market meant the final result although we accepted it, was disappointing.

We acknowledge it is not straight forward process, dealing with multiple parties when selling a house, so Layne did well under the circumstances.

author: Exemplary service from Layne
title: Exemplary service from Layne
body:
We had the absolute pleasure of working alongside Layne to find our dream home. She went over and above the call of duty to ensure we had all the information we needed and that we weren’t kept in the dark. Constant communication and reliable updates are a hallmark of a great agent both of which Layne exemplify well. 

She supported us to create the best offer possible which didn’t need to be dollar focused. Her understanding of the sector and the market ensured our offer was successful. 

We’ve worked with many agents and none them have come near the level of professionalism and energy that Layne inspires. 

We absolutely recommend Layne’s services.

author: Exceptional Agent: Layne Hughes
title: Exceptional Agent: Layne Hughes
body:
Layne Hughes, real estate agent at Harcourts Khandallah, went above and beyond to help my family and me achieve our dream home. From the moment we met Layne, her engaging and lively personality made the entire experience enjoyable. Her meticulous attention to detail ensured that every aspect of our home search was carefully considered.

One of Layne's standout qualities was her exceptional communication skills. She kept us informed throughout the entire process, promptly addressing any questions or concerns we had. Layne's responsiveness and availability made us feel valued as clients, and we never felt left in the dark.

What truly impressed us about Layne was her genuine nature and integrity. She genuinely cared about our needs and worked tirelessly to find us the perfect home. Layne wasn't just an agent looking to make a quick sale; she became a trusted friend throughout the process. Her commitment to our satisfaction was unwavering, and she always put our best interests first.

Layne's dedication and professionalism were evident in every interaction. She navigated us through the intricacies of buying a home, ensuring that all necessary paperwork was handled accurately and efficiently. Her expertise and guidance were invaluable, making the entire process seamless and stress-free.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Layne Hughes from Harcourts Khandallah to anyone seeking a real estate agent. Her engaging personality, attention to detail, and excellent communication skills set her apart. Layne's genuine nature and integrity make her a rare gem in the industry. If you want a dedicated and reliable agent who will go above and beyond to help you find your dream home, Layne is the one to call.

Finally, I feel so strongly about Layne's ability I have written the following short poem:

Layne Hughes, a guiding light so bright,
With expertise that brings delight.
Her genuine care and friendship true,
Made our dream home come into view.

author: Layne went above and beyond to help up get our dream house
title: Layne went above and beyond to help up get our dream house
body: Layne helped us sell our house and then continued to help us find our perfect home. Layne was as invested as we were to help us get our dream house and we so appreciated having her as an Ally on our journey with us. She gave us advice to help put our best foot forward, based on her knowledge of the market and expertise. And it worked! We have our dream house and the starts aligned perfectly. We would definitely recommend Layne for both selling and buying.

author: Warm, kind and helpful
title: Warm, kind and helpful
body:
Layne helped me into my first ever property. I am so grateful. 

When i viewed the property she had put her own personal touch on the viewing by playing music and burning candles. It made the experience so much more relaxed and enjoyable. 

She was kind, warm, helpful, professional and fully prepared with all of the documents i needed to make a fully informed decision. She was patient with all of my questions. Even dropping around a bottle of champange on successful purchase. 

I will defintely be trying to hold on to Layne for any sales / purchases in the future.

author: Could not recommend Layne more!
title: Could not recommend Layne more!
body: We could not recommend Layne more. She is extremely professional, knowledgeable and efficient. Her communication was perfect, giving us updates as we went along. She was patient with us while we worked through the troubles of the current market and we got the result we were after. We loved working with Layne and are recommending her to everyone we know.

author: Outstanding Effort and Result!
title: Outstanding Effort and Result!
body:
We chose Layne, because of her energy, knowledge and enthusiasm for selling realestate. 
We had 100+ groups of buyers through our home.
Layne worked tirelessly and provided us with quality detailed weekly reporting of buyer feedback.
Come auction day we had 6 registered bidders and achieved a great result. 
Full credit to Layne, she has star qualities and we thoroughly recommend her to anyone thinking of selling.

author: Excellent!
title: Excellent!
body: Very helpful, communication was clear and quick. Went over and above to support us buying our first home.

author: Selling my house
title: Selling my house
body: Layne is an amazing real-estate agent. She is honest, committed to her work and cares deeply about the responsibilities she undertakes. Any real estate is lucky to have her and you are lucky if she is your agent. It was an absolute pleasure working with her. I highly recommend Layne and think anyone who has her as their agent should consider themselves lucky. Thank you Layne.

author: Layne is Highly Recommended!!!
title: Layne is Highly Recommended!!!
body:
Layne is very friendly and always there for any questions you may have.  She is always ready to answer any questions be it logical or otherwise.  

She always makes schedule for us for several visit requests and you can feel her really concerned and helping us in getting the property and not just getting the quick sale!

author: Very Professional and honest (5/5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️)
title: Very Professional and honest (5/5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️)
body: Layne was an absolute superstar in helping us buy our first home. Very professional, great communication skills and very passionate and kind with all her dealings. She is highly recommended. Thanks so much for making our first home purchase stress-free. Keep up the good work Layne! All the best for future..😊

author: Friendly and hardworking
title: Friendly and hardworking
body:
We had a good experience with Layne. 
Eventhough market was tough but we Layne worked hard and got our house sold.

author: Friendly and motivated
title: Friendly and motivated
body:
Was a pleasure to deal with Layne. 
Market was tough but she managed to get us a decent offer.
Motivated young lady with high sales skills.

author: First-rate service
title: First-rate service
body: Layne was excellent to deal with. She was professional at all times, knew a great deal about the house I purchased, and communicated in a friendly and highly efficient manner. I definitely recommend her services.

author: Good Experience
title: Good Experience
body: Layne recommended the perfect house to us then assisted us through to process of buying up until we secured our home!
